package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_write_passthrough_without_domain_validation: Write-style service methods that mostly forward to repositories without visible domain guard checks.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule184NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule184NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule184NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario184Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule184NegativeService, input Rule184NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
